engine.cmd.pair.invalid_num: The input is not a valid number.
engine.cmd.start.first_use: If this is your first time, send a message to trigger the pairing process.
engine.cmd.start.not_yours: If this Lobster is not yours, please contact the owner to get access.
engine.cmd.start.commands: You can also use the following commands:
engine.cmd.help.id: /id - Get current user and chat ID
engine.cmd.help.op: /op - Grant operator permission to a user (reply or `/op [userid]`), root required
engine.cmd.help.deop: /deop - Revoke operator permission from a user (reply or `/deop [userid]`), root required
engine.cmd.help.status: /status - Get current session, chat, and context status
engine.cmd.help.save: /save - Save the current session and start a new one
engine.cmd.help.new: /new - Delete the current session data and start a new one
engine.cmd.help.compact: /compact - Compact the current session by summarizing context. Done automatically when context is about to overflow
engine.cmd.help.model: /model - Get or set the current model via `/model [model id]`
engine.cmd.help.session: /session - Get or switch session via `/session [session id]`
engine.cmd.help.provider: /provider - Get or switch provider via `/provider [provider id]`
engine.cmd.help.pair: /pair - Pair with your Lobster via `/pair xxxxxx`
engine.cmd.default.invalid: Sorry, that is not a valid command. Please check for typos.
engine.cmd.save.success:
Saved session `{{ .Old }}` and created session `{{ .New }}` with provider `{{ .Name }}` and model `{{ .Model }}`.
To change provider or model, use `/provider` or `/model`. To delete and create a new session, use `/new`.
engine.cmd.new.success:
Deleted session `{{ .Old }}` and created session `{{ .New }}` with provider `{{ .Name }}` and model `{{ .Model }}`.
To change provider or model, use `/provider` or `/model`. To save and create a new session, use `/save`.
engine.cmd.model.list: Available Models (use `/status` to see current model, `/model [id]` to change):
engine.cmd.model.update_error: An error occurred while updating the model for this session.
engine.cmd.model.success: Successfully changed this session's model to `{{ .Name }}`.
engine.cmd.provider.list: Available Providers (use `/status` to see current provider, `/provider [name]` to change — the first model of the provider will be selected automatically):
engine.cmd.provider.update_error: An error occurred while updating the provider for this session.
engine.cmd.provider.success: Successfully changed this session's provider to `{{ .Name }}`, model `{{ .Model }}`.
engine.cmd.session.list: Session List (showing up to 20 latest; use `/status` to see the current session ID):
engine.cmd.session.data_error: An error occurred while retrieving session data.
engine.cmd.session.not_found: The session ID you entered does not exist.
engine.cmd.session.get_error: An error occurred while retrieving the session.
engine.cmd.session.update_error: An error occurred while switching the session.
engine.cmd.session.not_active: No active session, nothing to do.
engine.cmd.status.summary: Chatted {{ .Count }} times (called LLM {{ .LLMCount }} times), provider: `{{ .Name }}`, model: `{{ .Model }}`
engine.cmd.op.not_found: The user you want to grant permission to was not found.
engine.cmd.op.already_admin: That user is already an Administrator.
engine.cmd.op.create_error: An error occurred while creating the user.
engine.cmd.deop.not_found: The user you want to demote was not found.
engine.cmd.deop.find_error: An error occurred while looking up the user.
